highlight.title: Our Main Services
highlight.subtitle: Discover our 4 flagship services to support all your projects in French-speaking Switzerland.
highlight.travaux_desc: Complete or partial renovation of your property.
highlight.nettoyage_desc: End-of-lease cleaning, post-work cleaning and regular maintenance.
highlight.relocation_desc: Connecting you with your ideal home.

process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: Discover our process in 4 simple and transparent steps.
process.step1_desc: Call, email or use WhatsApp to describe your project.
process.step2_desc: Our experts listen to your needs and define the best solutions.
process.step3_desc: Receive a clear and personalized quote, with no obligation.
process.step4_desc: We deliver your project with quality and on-time completion.

properties.title: Available Properties
properties.subtitle: Find your next home in the Lake Geneva region. Contact us directly to arrange a visit.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete support for all your projects in French-speaking Switzerland.
services.cta_description: Contact us for a free, personalized quote. We'll respond within 24 hours.

search.title: Property Search
search.subtitle: Your personal property hunter in Geneva.
search.description: We actively search for the best opportunities for you — on- and off-market — combining prospecting, rigorous pre-selection and administrative validation. You save time and access rarely published properties.

features.selection: Rigorous pre-selection based on your criteria
features.negotiation: Support for negotiation and file preparation

appartements.title: Properties
appartements.subtitle: Browse our catalog of available properties.
appartements.description: Updated listings: apartments for rent and sale in the Lake Geneva region. Contact us directly to arrange a visit or get more information.

travaux.title: Construction & Renovation
travaux.subtitle: Complete or partial renovation of your property.
travaux.description: We manage your project from A to Z: assessment of needs, selection of certified local craftspeople, planning and quality control. Whether it's a complete overhaul, structural renovation or interior design, we guarantee a careful result and respect for deadlines.

features.renovation: Major renovations and shared wall work

nettoyage.title: Professional Cleaning
nettoyage.subtitle: End of lease, end of project and regular maintenance cleaning.
nettoyage.description: Trained teams and professional equipment for impeccable cleaning: guaranteed end of lease, post-project cleaning with waste removal, periodic building maintenance and window cleaning. We use eco-friendly products on request.

features.finbail: End of lease cleaning with handover checklist
features.vitres: Window and façade cleaning and degreasing

demenagement.title: Moving & Logistics
demenagement.subtitle: Private and professional moves, all-inclusive.
demenagement.description: Complete and stress-free organization of your move: estimation, professional packing, secure transport and installation in your new location. We offer insurance options, temporary storage and bulk item handling.

features.miseenplace: Installation and space organization at destination

relocation.title: Relocation & Housing Search
relocation.subtitle: Connecting you to find your ideal home.
relocation.description: Complete support for people in transition: area selection, file preparation, meetings with landlords and administrative follow-up. We facilitate quick and smooth settlement in French-speaking Switzerland.

features.recherche: Targeted search for rental/purchase matching your profile
features.preselection: Pre-selected viewings according to your priorities
features.dossier: Preparation and validation of rental files
features.miseenrelation: Connection with landlords and property managers

relocation.disclaimer: Referral and administrative assistance services only. Léman Prestige Sàrl does not act as a property manager and does not sign lease/sub-lease contracts on behalf of the parties.

souslocation.title: Sub-letting
souslocation.subtitle: Sub-letting management on behalf of third parties.
souslocation.description: Complete sub-letting management: search for reliable tenants, file verification, obtaining authorization from landlords and key handover organization. We handle communication and follow-up to minimize your paperwork.

features.contrat: Assistance in drafting the sub-lease agreement

souslocation.disclaimer: Referral and administrative assistance services only. Léman Prestige Sàrl does not act as a property manager and does not sign lease/sub-lease contracts on behalf of the parties.

administratif.title: Administrative Support
administratif.subtitle: Assistance with your administrative procedures in Switzerland.
administratif.description: Personalized support for all administrative procedures related to moving and housing: file preparation, official letters, service registrations and procedure follow-up. We simplify procedures for individuals and businesses.

features.documents: Organization and verification of supporting documents

administratif.cta_description: Contact us for personalized administrative assistance.

assurances.title: Insurance & Savings
assurances.subtitle: Connection with our insurance partners.
assurances.description: We facilitate connection with insurance partners for health, supplementary and savings solutions. Our role: compare options, explain implications and guide you toward the offer best suited to your situation.
assurances.benefits_subtitle: Clear, competitive and reliable insurance services.
assurances.benefit_couverture_desc: Offers adapted to your profile and budget.
assurances.benefit_transparence_desc: Clear explanations of coverage and exclusions.
assurances.benefit_rapidite_desc: Quick processing of requests and assistance with claims.
assurances.benefit_accompagnement_desc: A dedicated advisor to guide you every step of the way.
assurances.cta_description: Talk to an expert to compare the best options and optimize your premiums.
assurances.disclaimer: Referrals only. Léman Prestige Sàrl does not engage in any regulated brokerage or insurance advice activities.

about.title: About Léman Prestige
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in Geneva
about.description: Léman Prestige Sàrl offers referral and administrative support services in the Lake Geneva region. Our team supports you in your real estate projects, moves and administrative procedures.

proximity.title: Proximity
proximity.description: A single contact based in Geneva, available and responsive.

about.mission_title: Your trusted partner for all your projects
about.mission_text: At Léman Prestige, we believe every client deserves personalised attention and service excellence. Our experienced team supports you at every stage of your project, with discretion and professionalism.
about.cta_text: Our team is at your disposal to answer all your questions and support you in your endeavours.

footer.copyright: © {year} Léman Prestige SÀRL. All rights reserved.
footer.disclaimer: Léman Prestige Sàrl offers referral and administrative support services. Any activity requiring authorization is conducted exclusively by authorized partners, where applicable.

propertyDetail.noDescription: No description available for this listing.

confidentialite.title: Privacy Policy
confidentialite.intro_text: Léman Prestige Sàrl is committed to protecting the privacy of its website users. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data in accordance with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP).
confidentialite.data_text: We may collect the following data:
data_items: Documents submitted via our forms (ID, payslips, etc.)
usage_items: Process your quote and service requests
confidentialite.retention_text: Your personal data is retained for the duration necessary to process your request and in accordance with applicable legal obligations. Sensitive documents (ID, payslips) are deleted after processing your file, unless you agree otherwise.
confidentialite.security_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, modification, disclosure or destruction. Transmissions are secured by SSL (HTTPS) protocol.
confidentialite.rights_text: Under the FADP, you have the following rights:
rights_items: Right of access to your personal data
Right to deletion of your data
confidentialite.rights_contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at:
confidentialite.cookies_text: Our site uses cookies to improve user experience and analyze traffic. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies, but some website features may no longer work properly.
confidentialite.contact_text: For any questions regarding this privacy policy:

mentionsLegales.title: Legal Notice
mentionsLegales.editor_desc: Service company based in Geneva, Switzerland
mentionsLegales.activity_text: We offer administrative support, referral and assistance services for individuals and businesses. Some services are provided by authorized partners.
mentionsLegales.hosting_text: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc., a certified hosting services provider.
mentionsLegales.ip_text: All website content (text, images, logos, videos) is the property of Léman Prestige Sàrl or third parties who have granted a license. Any reproduction, representation or distribution without prior written authorization is prohibited.
mentionsLegales.liability_text: We strive to ensure the accuracy of information. However, we cannot be held responsible for omissions, inaccuracies or damages resulting from the use of the data provided.
mentionsLegales.insurance_text: Referral only. No regulated brokerage activities.
mentionsLegales.realestate_text: Administrative assistance. We do not act as a property management company.
